sections.paragraph:
m. pl. גְּשָׁמִים, const. גִּשְׁמֵי.

(1) rain, violent rain, heavy shower, different from מָטָר, which denotes any rain. Hence מְטַר גֶּשֶׁם “shower of rain,” Regenguß, Zec 10:1, and גֶּשֶׁם מָטָר Job 37:6. The same is also apparent from the epithets, as גֶּשֶׁם גָּדֹול 1Ki 18:45 נ׳ שֹׁוטֵף Eze 13:11, 13 Eze 13:13.

(2) [Geshem], pr.n. m. Neh 2:19 6:1 , , which is also written גַּשְׁמוּ.

גשם

id. With suff. גֻּשְׁמָהּ. Eze 22:24. [“But it is better to write without Mappik גֻּשְׁמָה for גֻּשְּׁמָה Pual of גָּשַׁם is rained upon, Vulg. compluta est.”]

גשם

with suff. גִּשְׁמֵהּ, גֶּשְׁמְהֹון Ch. body. Dan 4:30 5:21 . (Syriac ܓܫܘܽܡ, ܓܘܽܫܡܳܐ; Arabic جِسْمُ and جُثْمَانُ id. Comp. under גֶּרֶם).
